zh.lifeSummary: 當John Sackville於1489年3月17日出生在英國英格蘭素可時，他的父親Richard Sackville30歲，母親Isabel Digges25歲。他於1507年與Lady Margaret Boleyn結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年9月27日在英國素可維提哈姆享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可維提哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Sackville于1489年3月17日出生在英国英格兰素可时，他的父亲Richard Sackville30岁，母亲Isabel Digges25岁。他于1507年与Lady Margaret Boleyn结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年9月27日在英国素可維提哈姆享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰素可維提哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Sackville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Sauqueville (Seine-Maritime) or Sacquenville (Eure).

variants.name: Sackwild
meanings: Jewish (Ashkenazic): from a Yiddish form sakwild, apparently meaning something like ‘game(bird), or venison, in a bag’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Sackville was born on 17 March 1489, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard Sackville, was 30 and his mother, Isabel Digges, was 25. He married Lady Margaret Boleyn in 1507. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 27 September 1557, in Withyham, Sussex, England, at the age of 68, and was buried in Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Sackville est né le 17 mars 1489, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard Sackville, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabel Digges, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Boleyn en 1507. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 27 septembre 1557, à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Withyham, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Sackville am 17. März 1489 in Sussex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Sackville 30 und seine Mutter Isabel Digges 25. Er hat 1507 Lady Margaret Boleyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 27. September 1557 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Withyham, Sussex, England und wurde in Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Sackville è nato il il 17 marzo 1489 nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard Sackville, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabel Digges, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Boleyn nel 1507. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 27 settembre 1557, nel Withyham, Sussex, England, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Withyham, Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: John Sackvilleが1489年3月17日にイギリスイギリススセックスで生まれた時，父Richard Sackvilleは30歳，母Isabel Diggesは25歳であった。1507年にLady Margaret Boleynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年9月27日にイギリススセックスウィスイハムで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリススセックスウィスイハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Sackville(이)가 1489년 3월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Sackville(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel Digges(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1507년 Lady Margaret Boleyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 9월 27일 영국 수세스 위스이함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 위스이함에 묻혔다.

pt.17 March 1489–27 September 1557: 17 de março de 1489–27 de setembro de 1557
pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Sackville nasceu em 17 de março de 1489, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Richard Sackville, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabel Digges, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Boleyn em 1507. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 27 de setembro de 1557, em Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Sackville родился 17 марта 1489 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard Sackville было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel Digges, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Boleyn в 1507 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 27 сентября 1557 г. в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.17 March 1489–27 September 1557: 17 de marzo de 1489–27 de septiembre de 1557
es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Sackville nació el 17 de marzo de 1489, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Richard Sackville, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabel Digges, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Boleyn en 1507. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 27 de septiembre de 1557, en Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Withyham, Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
